name: CHEMLENS family admission benchmark phase2_mvp
notes: Per-family admission probe. acceptable_{top1,top3} expands to raw-name aliases under the same canonical family to reflect real alias tolerance. Use runner `run_family_admission_benchmark.py` to emit top1/top3 accuracy + confusion matrix.
